Description: Uninstall every gambling app and use phone content restrictions to block re-downloading. Daily check: if it's back, it's gone again.
Daily Action: Check app store restrictions are active

Description: Remove saved payment methods, cards, and autofill credentials tied to gambling sites. Re-entering info = friction wall.
Daily Action: Verify no saved payment methods exist

Description: Identify the exact moment you reach for a gambling app (boredom/downtime/stress) and replace with a 5-minute action: walk, pushups, language lesson, journaling.
Set daily screen time limit of 0 minutes on gambling-category apps/websites. Someone else holds the Screen Time passcode.
Daily Action: Confirm screen time limits are enforced

Description: Change phone wallpaper to bank statement showing losses or a written reminder of why you're stopping.

Move Name: Announce the Bet You Didn't Make
Description: Each day write down one specific bet you would have made and the amount. Track running total of money saved.
Daily Action: Log the bet not made and amount saved

Description: Unsubscribe from every gambling promo email, block SMS marketing, turn off push notifications.
Daily Action: Check for and block any new gambling notifications

Description: Text one trusted person daily: 'Day X, no gambling.' Social commitment creates cost to relapsing.
When urge hits, immediately transfer the amount you would have gambled into a separate savings account.
At end of each day log what you did with the time you would have spent gambling. Even 15 min documented.
Daily Action: Log time reclaimed and activity done
